name: PAX Concentrate Insert Lid
summary: Made from premium metal, the PAX Concentrate Insert Lid enables the usage of concentrates in conjunction with yourr PAX Plus or PAX 3 Vaporiser.
description: Made from premium metal, the PAX Concentrate Insert Lid enables the usage of concentrates in conjunction with yourr PAX Plus or PAX 3 Vaporiser. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
